title: CL Educate is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: CL Educate is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
CL Educate invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Subject Matter Expert at our Surat location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About CL Educate:
CL Educate is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CL Educate!
